diagrams.name: application_startup
diagrams.title: Application Startup & Initialization
diagrams.description: Platform-specific launch sequence through to game-ready state across Android, iOS, Desktop, and Server

diagrams.name: game_loop_core
diagrams.title: Core Game Loop & Update Tick
diagrams.description: Main per-frame update cycle: game state polling, logic update, async processing, and rendering dispatch

diagrams.name: content_loading_pipeline
diagrams.title: Content Loading Pipeline
diagrams.description: Discovery, loading, and registration of all game content types (blocks, units, items, bullets) at startup

diagrams.name: world_generation
diagrams.title: World & Map Generation
diagrams.description: Procedural map generation pipeline: generator selection, tile placement, filter passes, and world finalisation

diagrams.name: save_load_game
diagrams.title: Save & Load Game State
diagrams.description: Full game-state serialisation and deserialisation: versioned save writing, world snapshot, entity IO, and meta handling

diagrams.name: map_io_and_editor
diagrams.title: Map IO & Editor Workflow
diagrams.description: Map file reading/writing, preview generation, processor configuration in the in-game map editor

diagrams.name: player_input_building_placement
diagrams.title: Player Input & Building Placement
diagrams.description: Input event processing, block selection, placement validation, and build plan execution for desktop and mobile

diagrams.name: unit_ai_behavior
diagrams.title: Unit AI Behavior Update
diagrams.description: Per-unit AI tick: stance evaluation, target acquisition, movement, attacking, and fallback logic

diagrams.name: logic_script_execution
diagrams.title: Logic Script Compilation & Execution
diagrams.description: In-game programmable processor lifecycle: source parsing, assembly, variable resolution, and per-tick statement execution

diagrams.name: network_client_flow
diagrams.title: Network Client Connection & Sync
diagrams.description: Client-side connection handshake, world snapshot receipt, packet dispatch, and reconnection handling

diagrams.name: network_server_management
diagrams.title: Network Server Management
diagrams.description: Server command processing, player join/kick/ban validation, admin rule enforcement, and world state broadcast

diagrams.name: resource_transport_distribution
diagrams.title: Resource Transport & Distribution
diagrams.description: Item and liquid routing through conveyors, routers, and junctions; buffer management and overflow handling

diagrams.name: power_grid_management
diagrams.title: Power Grid Management
diagrams.description: Power generation, consumption calculation, grid connectivity update, and node overload handling

diagrams.name: campaign_sector_management
diagrams.title: Campaign & Sector Progression
diagrams.description: Sector capture/loss evaluation, damage simulation, tech-tree unlock triggers, and planet campaign state transitions

diagrams.name: fog_of_war_update
diagrams.title: Fog of War Update Cycle
diagrams.description: Per-tick visibility computation, team-based fog state writes, and dynamic reveal/conceal transitions

diagrams.name: crash_handling_reporting
diagrams.title: Crash Handling & Error Reporting
diagrams.description: Uncaught exception capture, mod-cause identification, crash report file generation, and user notification

diagrams.name: mod_loading_and_scripting
diagrams.title: Mod Loading & Script Injection
diagrams.description: Mod discovery from filesystem/workshop, script context initialisation via Rhino, content injection, and reload lifecycle

diagrams.name: steam_integration_flow
diagrams.title: Steam Integration Flow
diagrams.description: Steam network lobby/matchmaking, workshop upload/download, achievement unlocking, and stat synchronisation

diagrams.name: annotation_processing_codegen
diagrams.title: Annotation Processing & Code Generation
diagrams.description: Compile-time annotation processor pipeline: entity component generation, remote-call stub generation, and asset region loading
